message:
fix(serve,agentmail): overhaul Agent Mail HTTP error handling with correct status codes and structured conflict responses

Error handling in mail/reservation HTTP handlers was inconsistent — many paths
returned a generic 500 with ErrCodeInternalError regardless of the actual problem.
This caused clients to retry on non-retryable errors and made debugging difficult.

Error classification helpers (mail.go):
- Three new helpers (writeAgentMailAgentActionError,
  writeAgentMailMessageActionError, writeAgentMailReservationError) centralize
  error classification, mapping known errors to appropriate HTTP status codes:
  404 for not-found, 409 for reservation conflicts, 501 for not-implemented
- All ~15 mail/reservation handlers now use these helpers instead of raw
  writeErrorResponse

Bug fixes:
- errors.go: reservation-conflict detection changed from OR (Contains("conflict")
  || Contains("reservation")) to AND — the previous logic false-positived on any
  message mentioning "reservation"
- tools.go: GetReservation now wraps its "not found" error with ErrNotFound so
  the error classification chain works correctly
- handleReservePaths now handles partial success: if ReservePaths returns both
  a result and a conflict error, renders structured 409 response with both
  granted and conflicting reservations instead of discarding the result

API consistency:
- RenewReservationsResult.Reservations JSON tag changed from "reservations"
  to "file_reservations" for API field naming consistency
- Removed unused ErrCodeReservationFailed constant

Tests (server_test.go):
- New newMockAgentMailMCPServer test helper replaces inlined mock server
  boilerplate across all test cases
- New test cases: message-not-found on reply (404), reservation conflict
  returning structured 409, not-implemented for get-reservation (501),
  not-found for missing reservation (404), renew returns renewed reservations,
  agent-not-found on mark-read (404), not-implemented for search (501)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -190,6 +190,7 @@ func TestMapJSONRPCError(t *testing.T) {
 		{"agent not registered", &JSONRPCError{Code: -32000, Message: "Agent not registered in project"}, false, ErrAgentNotRegistered},
 		{"message not found", &JSONRPCError{Code: -32000, Message: "Message not found"}, false, ErrMessageNotFound},
 		{"reservation conflict", &JSONRPCError{Code: -32000, Message: "Reservation conflict detected"}, false, ErrReservationConflict},
+		{"reservation not found", &JSONRPCError{Code: -32000, Message: "Reservation 42 not found"}, false, ErrNotFound},
 		{"generic not found", &JSONRPCError{Code: -32000, Message: "Thread not found"}, false, ErrNotFound},
 		{"literal method not found", &JSONRPCError{Code: -32601, Message: "Method not found"}, false, ErrNotImplemented},
 		{"invalid request code", &JSONRPCError{Code: -32600, Message: "bad request"}, false, ErrInvalidRequest},
